data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Added ### Resolution Loop section after Proposal Generation in SKILL.md. Section includes: accept path, revise path (max 2 cycles), escalate path, state file at /tmp/approach-resolution-<story-id>.json with 4h TTL, approach-decision-maker dispatch (opus, timeout 600000), sprint vs standalone context handling. Updated Process Overview flowchart. Removed RED marker from .test-index.
